Our Services

Complete Facility Services Available in White Plains, NY

In addition to government cleaning, we offer a full suite of commercial cleaning and facility maintenance services throughout White Plains and New York.

✓
Janitorial: Daily, weekly, and monthly cleaning programs for lobbies, restrooms, common areas, offices, and workspaces.
✓
Disinfection: CDC-compliant electrostatic disinfection, hospital-grade sanitizers, and ATP bioluminescence testing for verifiable pathogen elimination.
✓
Floor Care: Strip, seal, and refinish hard floors.
✓
Day Porter: On-site daytime staff for continuous upkeep of high-traffic areas, restroom monitoring, supply replenishment, and lobby presentation.
✓
Maintenance: Light plumbing, electrical, HVAC filter changes, painting touch-ups, and general handyman services — one vendor for everything.
✓
Post-Construction: Three-stage professional cleanup: rough clean, light clean, and final touch.
